side_effects.description: Bad side effects when going a little higher than intended dose on a Sema/Tirz stack; described as the only time they had bad side effects in all their years of use

protocol_notes: User mentions having a prescription for name brand (likely semaglutide) and extensive prior research before starting. Previously practiced reconstitution with BAC water before using actual peptides. Has used a Sema/Tirz stack.
